name: Kingdom of Sheba
description: Yemen's civilisational origin. The Sabaean kingdom at Marib produced some of the ancient world's most sophisticated monumental architecture — the Awwam Temple, Barran Temple (Throne of Bilqis), and the Great Dam of Marib, an engineering marvel of the ancient world. UNESCO World Heritage 2023.
traditional: Massive limestone ashlar blocks, hypostyle halls, monumental gateway pylons.
transitional: Sabaean formal language adapted into early Islamic courtyard plans.
contemporary: Contemporary Ma'rib inspired by pre-Islamic geometry and proportional systems.
